response.justification: Bogdan comfortably exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of full-stack work, including recent TypeScript/Node.js/React product experience at Optilyz and RIDE Capital, and current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq — a rare match for the required AI agent development skill. He has a CS degree, strong testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses), and cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes). The main gaps are stack-specific: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience, no Kotlin, and his frontend history leans more on Ember than React, so depth in the exact primary stack should be probed in interview.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience with recent TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB product work
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience, directly matching the required AI agent development skill
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, authored testing frameworks, and taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework for this role
Kotlin is absent and Java experience appears limited and dated, weakening the secondary stack fit
Frontend history is Ember-heavy; React depth is limited to one recent role, and Vitest/Playwright are not mentioned

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
Missing Nest.js and weak Kotlin/Java coverage
